EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.name} from host {src.host} failed to execute the command "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} from host {src.host} failed to execute the command "{object.name} {object.value}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} from host {src.host} executed the command "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} from host {src.host} executed the command "{object.name} {object.value}" on host {event_src.host}
